name: Puffy Baked Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites in a bowl until stiff peaks form.
2. In another bowl, beat egg yolks, milk, wine, and salt until smooth.
3. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the beaten whites.
4. Spray two 12-ounce individual casseroles with nonstick spray.
5. Divide bread between casseroles.
6. Top each layer of bread with cheese.
7. Pour egg mixture over bread and cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F oven for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Note: For a different flavor, try using sourdough French bread.
